evidence: Initial generated criteria were placeholders; plan file names concrete CLI evidence.
message: Criterion must be observable and binary under ulw-loop.

steering.evidence: Initial generated criteria were placeholders; plan file names concrete CLI evidence.
steering.rationale: Criterion must be observable and binary under ulw-loop.

goals.title: Implement the approved codex-design workflow redesign plan as five de...
goals.objective: Implement the approved codex-design workflow redesign plan as five delivery goals: 1 remove the current image generation feature from active code and UI while preserving normal image attachments; 2 make normal DesignForge design requests design-only with no automatic preview, capture, runtime test, package install, npm run typecheck, or tsc --noEmit, and update prompt/copy plus preview/verify missing-dependency behavior; 3 create DESIGN.md and redesign the app as a JetBrains Mono OpenCode-style dense 3-pane workbench with fixed composer and no image generation controls; 4 add selection-ready preview and composer-linked component editing while keeping runtime tools explicit manual actions only; 5 write the embedded ima2-gen-inspired Image Workspace architecture contract and run final build, Rust check, rg regression checks, and browser visual QA evidence. Use .omo/plans/codex-design-workflow-redesign.md as the execution source of truth. This is HEAVY work.

successCriteria.scenario: happy path for: Implement the approved codex-design workflow redesign plan as five delivery g...
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Replace via revise_criterion with observable happy-path proof for goal 1.

successCriteria.scenario: edge case (boundary/empty/malformed)
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Replace via revise_criterion with boundary or malformed-input proof for: Implement the approved codex-design workflow redesign plan as five delivery g....

successCriteria.scenario: regression: adjacent surface still works
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Replace via revise_criterion with regression proof for neighboring behavior after: Implement the approved codex-design workflow redesign plan as five delivery g....

goals.title: Implement the approved codex-design workflow redesign plan as five de...
goals.objective: Implement the approved codex-design workflow redesign plan as five delivery goals: 1 remove the current image generation feature from active code and UI while preserving normal image attachments; 2 make normal DesignForge design requests design-only with no automatic preview, capture, runtime test, package install, npm run typecheck, or tsc --noEmit, and update prompt/copy plus preview/verify missing-dependency behavior; 3 create DESIGN.md and redesign the app as a JetBrains Mono OpenCode-style dense 3-pane workbench with fixed composer and no image generation controls; 4 add selection-ready preview and composer-linked component editing while keeping runtime tools explicit manual actions only; 5 write the embedded ima2-gen-inspired Image Workspace architecture contract and run final build, Rust check, rg regression checks, and browser visual QA evidence. Use .omo/plans/codex-design-workflow-redesign.md as the execution source of truth. This is HEAVY work.
